title: The Vanishing of Professor Lund
description: A detective investigates the disappearance of a university professor from a locked study. Tests clue tracking, NPC interrogation, deduction, and information synthesis.
setting: A prestigious Scandinavian university. Professor Lund vanished from his locked study three days ago. No signs of forced entry. His research notes are missing.

protagonist.name: Detective Voss
protagonist.description: A methodical private investigator, mid-30s, known for patience and attention to detail.

turns.user_input: Enter the university and ask the receptionist about Professor Lund
Get directions to Professor Lund's study and go there
Examine the door to the study. Is it still locked?
Pick the lock and enter the study
Search the desk thoroughly. What papers are left?
Check the bookshelves. Anything out of place?
Look at the window. Could someone have left through it?
Write down all my observations in my notebook
Leave the study and ask who has keys to this room
Go find the department secretary, Margrete
Ask Margrete about Lund's behavior in the days before he vanished
Ask if Lund had any visitors recently
Ask about the research he was working on
Get the names of Lund's graduate students
Find the first graduate student, Erik, and talk to him
Ask Erik when he last saw Lund
Ask Erik about Lund's research and if anything was controversial
Does Erik seem nervous? Study his body language
Thank Erik and go find the second student, Hanna
Ask Hanna the same questions I asked Erik
Does Hanna's story match Erik's? Note any discrepancies
Ask Hanna if Lund had any personal problems or enemies
Go to the university library and check if Lund borrowed any books recently
Look at the titles of the books he borrowed. Any pattern?
Search the library's digital records for Lund's recent database access
Review my notebook. What do I know so far? What are the contradictions?
Go back to Lund's study. I want to check behind the bookshelf I noticed earlier
There's something hidden back here. What is it?
Examine what I found carefully
This changes things. Go find Erik again immediately
Confront Erik with what I found behind the bookshelf
Press him harder. His story doesn't add up
Let Erik go but follow him discreetly
Where did Erik go? What is he doing?
Take note of this and go talk to the department head
Ask the department head about Lund's funding sources
Was there any financial irregularity in the department?
Ask about the relationship between Lund and his colleague, Professor Dahl
Find Professor Dahl and introduce myself
Ask Dahl about their relationship with Lund
Mention the research Lund was doing. Watch Dahl's reaction
Check my phone. Any new messages or tips?
Go to Lund's home address. Look around outside first
Knock on the door. Anyone home?
Search Lund's home study for anything the police might have missed
Check his personal computer if it's here
Review all my evidence. What's my theory now?
Go back to the university. I need to check one more thing in the study
I think I know what happened. Gather Margrete, Erik, and Hanna
Lay out my full theory of what happened to Professor Lund
